summary: PHASE 3.4 Adaptive Scheduler testing completed successfully. All 12 scheduler endpoints tested with 100% success rate. Verified autonomous scheduling system with daily calibration, hourly health checks, and configurable intervals.

minor_issues.issue: Some policy confidence filtering not working as expected
minor_issues.impact: Policy tests showing 72.7% success rate vs 100% for scheduler

passed_tests: Scheduler Health Check - Module scheduler v3.4 responding correctly
Scheduler Status - Running state and configuration accessible
Scheduler Configuration - All config values match expected defaults
Start/Stop Scheduler - Background worker starts and stops correctly
Daily Calibration Job - Full pipeline execution (calibration → policy → apply → snapshot)
Hourly Health Check - Performance monitoring and state tracking
Snapshot Job - State snapshot creation and storage
Full Adaptive Cycle - Complete autonomous cycle with 4 jobs
Job History - Execution history tracking with 14 total jobs
Next Jobs Scheduling - Proper scheduling intervals (24h daily, 60min hourly)
Config Updates - Dynamic configuration changes working
Mock Data Integration - Using mock trade data for testing as specified
